# Wildberries SDK

> Multi-language SDK for the Wildberries marketplace API (Python, Node.js, Go, PHP, Rust), auto-generated from official OpenAPI specs and kept in sync via GitHub Actions.

All five language clients share the same API surface because they are generated from the same YAML specs in `specs/`. Pick the client that matches your stack and the spec module that matches the area of the Wildberries API you need.

## Language clients

- [Python — docs/python/README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/docs/python/README.md): install from [PyPI (`wildberries-sdk`)](https://pypi.org/project/wildberries-sdk/)
- [Node.js / TypeScript — docs/npm/README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/docs/npm/README.md): install from [npm (`wildberries-sdk`)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wildberries-sdk)
- [Go — docs/go/README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/docs/go/README.md): `go get github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/clients/go/<module>`
- [PHP — docs/php/README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/docs/php/README.md): install from [Packagist (`eslazarev/wildberries-sdk`)](https://packagist.org/packages/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk)
- [Rust — docs/rust/README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/docs/rust/README.md): crates on [crates.io (`wildberries_sdk_*`)](https://crates.io/search?q=wildberries_sdk)

## OpenAPI specs (source of truth)

- [01-general.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/01-general.yaml) — auth, common primitives, rate limits
- [02-products.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/02-products.yaml) — product catalog, media, characteristics
- [03-orders-fbs.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/03-orders-fbs.yaml) — FBS (Fulfillment By Seller) orders
- [04-orders-dbw.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/04-orders-dbw.yaml) — DBW (Delivery By Wildberries) orders
- [05-orders-dbs.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/05-orders-dbs.yaml) — DBS (Delivery By Seller) orders
- [06-in-store-pickup.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/06-in-store-pickup.yaml) — in-store pickup orders
- [07-orders-fbw.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/07-orders-fbw.yaml) — FBW (Fulfillment By Wildberries) supplies
- [08-promotion.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/08-promotion.yaml) — marketing, advertising, promotions
- [09-communications.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/09-communications.yaml) — buyer communications, reviews, questions
- [10-tariffs.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/10-tariffs.yaml) — logistics and commission tariffs
- [11-analytics.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/11-analytics.yaml) — analytics reports
- [12-reports.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/12-reports.yaml) — sales and stock reports
- [13-finances.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/specs/13-finances.yaml) — finances, payments, returns

## Project info

- [README.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/README.md) — overview, install snippets, quickstart
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) — per-release spec diff summaries
- [Source repo](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk) — GitHub

## Optional

- [Generation config — generation.yaml](https://github.com/eslazarev/wildberries-sdk/blob/main/generation.yaml) — list of upstream specs and supported target languages
